item.title: AI Regulation Frameworks Compared: EU vs US vs China
item.dc:creator: Maria Santos
item.description: A comprehensive comparison of how three major powers approach AI governance.
item.content:encoded:
AI Regulation Frameworks Compared

The European Union's AI Act, America's executive orders, and China's algorithmic regulations represent fundamentally different philosophies on governing artificial intelligence.

This analysis examines each approach through the lenses of innovation, safety, and civil liberties.

EU: Risk-Based Classification

The EU AI Act classifies AI systems by risk level, from minimal to unacceptable. High-risk systems face stringent requirements including transparency, human oversight, and data governance.

item.title: Quantum Computing Milestone: 1000 Logical Qubits
item.dc:creator: James Wright
item.description: Researchers achieve a new record in error-corrected quantum computing.
item.content:encoded: In a breakthrough published in Nature, a team of physicists demonstrated a quantum processor with 1000 logical qubits, surpassing previous records by an order of magnitude.

item.title: The Browser Wars Are Back: A New Challenger Appears
item.dc:creator: Kenji Tanaka
item.description: A privacy-focused browser built on a completely new rendering engine gains traction.

item.title: Open Source Funding Crisis: Maintainer Burnout Reaches Record Levels
item.dc:creator: Priya Sharma
item.description: A survey of 5,000 open source maintainers reveals widespread burnout and financial strain.

item.title: 5G Coverage Map: Where We Stand in 2024
item.dc:creator: Carlos Rivera
item.description: An interactive analysis of global 5G deployment progress and gaps.
